description_long: This information point consists of a tall, rectangular, free-standing display column with a black background and bold, white text reading 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' on one face. The other faces feature large, high-resolution images of various colored cosmetic brushes and pencils, arranged vertically for maximum visibility. The structure appears to be made from lightweight, rigid panels, likely metal or composite, with a smooth, glossy finish that enhances the vibrancy of the printed graphics. The column stands on a wooden floor panel, suggesting it is designed for indoor or semi-sheltered outdoor environments such as trade shows, lobbies, or urban plazas. The display is human-scaled, with a height slightly taller than an average adult male, making it easily readable and approachable. There are no visible interactive elements, but the object serves as a prominent visual marker and information source.
description: A tall, glossy black display column with bold white branding and colorful cosmetic brush graphics, designed as an eye-catching information point. Its sleek, modern panels make it suitable for urban or commercial environments.
description_view_0: The front face shows the 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' branding in large white letters and a close-up of a single cosmetic brush, with a suited man standing beside for scale.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the vertical arrangement of colorful cosmetic brushes and pencils, with the man facing the display for size reference.
description_view_2: The rear view focuses on the full set of cosmetic brush graphics, showing their colors and details against the black background, with the man standing behind.
description_view_3: The opposite side again features the bold 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' text and a single brush, with the man partially obscured behind the column.
attribute_facade_detailing: The facade features large, high-contrast printed graphics with bold sans-serif typography and photorealistic images of cosmetic brushes, creating a visually striking and modern appearance. The surface is smooth and glossy, with no visible ornamentation or relief.
